step_by_step_thinking:
Cell-mediated immunity plays an important role in chronic inflammatory diseases like periodontitis, where specific immune responses target bacteria found in dental plaque. The presence of antigen-specific CD4+ or CD8+ T cells would suggest a cellular response against these pathogens.
